name: Mexican Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Put shredded Swiss cheese into the prepared tostaco shells.
2. Mix crumbled cooked bacon with chopped green chilies and drained chilies, then add to the shells.
3. Beat together eggs, light cream, and salt until well combined.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the top of the ingredients in each shell.
5. Sprinkle cayenne pepper over the top of each quiche.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes, or until set.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Makes 4 servings.
